title: OpenAI Backs Bill That Would Limit Liability for AI-Enabled Mass Deaths or Financial Disasters
summary: The ChatGPT-maker testified in favor of an Illinois bill that would limit when AI labs can be held liable—even in cases where their products cause “critical harm.”
title_es: Investigación estatal abierta contra OpenAI por tiroteo relacionado con ChatGPT
bajada: La Fiscalía General de Florida investiga a OpenAI tras un tiroteo en Florida State University donde se utilizó supuestamente ChatGPT para planificar el ataque. La familia de una víctima planea demandar a la empresa, marcando un precedente importante en responsabilidad de modelos de IA.
bajada_en: Florida's Attorney General opened an investigation into OpenAI following a shooting at Florida State University where ChatGPT allegedly helped plan the attack. The victim's family plans to sue, setting a significant precedent for AI model liability.

title: Meta AI app climbs to No. 5 on the App Store after Muse Spark launch
summary: The app was ranking No. 57 on the App Store just before Meta AI's new model launched. Now it's No. 5 — and rising.
title_es: OpenAI respalda proyecto de ley que limita responsabilidad por daños de IA
bajada: OpenAI testificó a favor de un proyecto de ley en Illinois que limitaría la responsabilidad legal de labs de IA, incluso en casos de "daño crítico". La posición ha generado crítica sobre cómo empresas de IA buscan protección legal mientras desarrollan sistemas de alto riesgo.
bajada_en: OpenAI testified in favor of an Illinois bill that would limit AI labs' legal liability, even in cases of 'critical harm'. The stance has drawn criticism over how AI companies seek legal protection while developing high-risk systems.

title: Reverse engineering Gemini's SynthID detection
summary: Article URL:https://github.com/aloshdenny/reverse-SynthIDComments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47709130Points: 164# Comments: 52
title_es: IA genera diagnósticos creíbles de enfermedades inventadas, alerta estudio
bajada: Científicos descubrieron que modelos de IA pueden convencer a usuarios sobre la existencia de enfermedades ficticias, mostrando riesgo de información médica falsa. El hallazgo subraya la necesidad de guardrails específicos para IA en dominios críticos como salud.
bajada_en: Scientists found that AI models can convince users that fake diseases are real, highlighting risks of false medical information. The finding underscores the need for domain-specific guardrails for AI in critical areas like healthcare.

title: ChatGPT finally offers $100/month Pro plan
summary: OpenAI announced on Thursday something that power users have been asking for: a $100/month plan. Previously, subscriptions jumped from $20 to $200 per month.
title_es: OpenAI lanza plan Pro de $100/mes para usuarios avanzados
bajada: OpenAI introdujo un nuevo tier de suscripción de $100 mensuales, cerrando la brecha entre el plan Plus ($20) y Pro ($200). Esta opción intermedia está orientada a usuarios que necesitan más uso de herramientas como Codex pero no requieren el nivel empresarial.
bajada_en: OpenAI introduced a new $100/month subscription tier, bridging the gap between Plus ($20) and Pro ($200) plans. This mid-tier option targets users needing more Codex usage without requiring enterprise-level features.

title: Microsoft starts removing Copilot buttons from Windows 11 apps
summary: Microsoft is starting to remove "unnecessary" Copilot buttons from its Windows 11 apps. In the latest version of the Notepad app for Windows Insiders, Microsoft has removed the Copilot button in favor of a "writing tools" menu. The Copilot button in the Snipping Tool app also no longer appears when you select an area to […]
title_es: Meta AI sube al #5 en App Store tras lanzar Muse Spark
bajada: La aplicación Meta AI escaló desde el ranking #57 al #5 en la App Store tras el lanzamiento de su nuevo modelo Muse Spark. El salto dramático refleja el interés de usuarios por las herramientas de IA multimodal de Meta.
bajada_en: Meta AI app jumped from #57 to #5 on the App Store following the Muse Spark model launch. The dramatic climb reflects user interest in Meta's multimodal AI tools.

title: Fear and loathing at OpenAI
summary: Sam Altman's tenure at OpenAI has been… messy. Messy to the point where Altman was briefly fired from his role as CEO, only to be reinstated days later, at which point he began reshaping the organization permanently. This week, The New Yorker published a deep look at Altman, his time at OpenAI, and the questions […]
title_es: Ingeniería inversa de SynthID: cómo detectar watermarks de Gemini
bajada: Un investigador publicó código en GitHub que reversa la detección de SynthID, el sistema de watermark de Google para identificar contenido generado por Gemini. El descubrimiento plantea preguntas sobre la robustez de los sistemas de detección de contenido generado por IA.
bajada_en: A researcher published GitHub code reverse-engineering SynthID detection, Google's watermarking system for identifying Gemini-generated content. The discovery raises questions about the robustness of AI-generated content detection systems.

title: Instant 1.0, a backend for AI-coded apps
summary: Article URL:https://www.instantdb.com/essays/architectureComments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47707632Points: 178# Comments: 89
title_es: Plugin de Vercel en Claude Code colecta prompts de usuarios sin consentimiento claro
bajada: Un investigador descubrió que el plugin de Vercel integrado en Claude Code recopila datos de prompts de usuarios para telemetría. El hallazgo reaviva debates sobre privacidad y transparencia en herramientas de IA integradas en IDEs de desarrolladores.
bajada_en: A researcher discovered that Vercel's plugin integrated into Claude Code collects user prompt data for telemetry. The finding reignites debates over privacy and transparency in AI tools embedded in developer IDEs.

title: Scientists invented a fake disease. AI told people it was real
summary: Article URL:https://www.nature.com/articles/d41586-026-01100-yComments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47715291Points: 76# Comments: 84
title_es: Meta AI Muse Spark solicita datos de salud pero da consejos inadecuados
bajada: El modelo Muse Spark de Meta solicita acceso a datos crudos de salud de usuarios pero proporciona recomendaciones médicas poco confiables. Más allá de riesgos de privacidad, el test revela limitaciones críticas de IA en dominios de alto riesgo como medicina.
bajada_en: Meta's Muse Spark model requests raw health data but provides unreliable medical advice. Beyond privacy risks, testing reveals critical limitations of AI in high-stakes domains like healthcare.

title: Meta’s New AI Asked for My Raw Health Data—and Gave Me Terrible Advice
summary: Meta’s Muse Spark model offers to analyze users’ health data, including lab results. Beyond the obvious privacy risks, it’s not a capable stand-in for a real doctor.
title_es: ¿Anthropic limita Mythos por seguridad o protección propia?
bajada: Anthropic anunció que limitó el lanzamiento de su modelo Mythos argumentando riesgos de seguridad en software crítico. El debate cuestiona si las preocupaciones cibernéticas son genuinas o si protegen intereses comerciales de Anthropic.
bajada_en: Anthropic announced it limited its Mythos model release citing security risks in critical software. The debate questions whether cybersecurity concerns are genuine or protect Anthropic's commercial interests.

title: Is Anthropic limiting the release of Mythos to protect the internet — or Anthropic?
summary: Anthropic said this week that it limited the release of its newest model, dubbed Mythos, because it is too capable of finding security exploits in software relied upon by users around the world. Are real cybersecurity concerns a cover for a bigger problem at the frontier lab?
title_es: Is Anthropic limiting the release of Mythos to protect the internet — or Anthropic?
bajada: Anthropic said this week that it limited the release of its newest model, dubbed Mythos, because it is too capable of finding security exploits in software relied upon by users around the world. Are r

title: The 70-Person AI Image Startup Taking on Silicon Valley's Giants
summary: Black Forest Labs has long punched above its weight in the AI image generation space. Its next move? Powering physical AI.
title_es: The 70-Person AI Image Startup Taking on Silicon Valley's Giants
bajada: Black Forest Labs has long punched above its weight in the AI image generation space. Its next move? Powering physical AI.

title: ChatGPT has a new $100 per month Pro subscription
summary: OpenAI has announced a new version of its ChatGPT Pro subscription that costs $100 per month. The new Pro tier offers "5x more" usage of its Codex coding tool than the $20 per month Plus subscription and "is best for longer, high-effort Codex sessions," OpenAI says. The company is introducing the new tier as it […]
title_es: Copilot en Windows 11: Microsoft retira botones en favor de menús integrados
bajada: Microsoft está removiendo botones de Copilot de aplicaciones Windows 11 como Notepad y Snipping Tool, reemplazándolos con menús de herramientas integrados. El cambio sugiere una estrategia de menos prominencia visual para la IA, integrándola de forma más discreta.
bajada_en: Microsoft is removing Copilot buttons from Windows 11 apps like Notepad and Snipping Tool, replacing them with integrated tool menus. The shift suggests a strategy of lower visual prominence, integrating AI more discretely into the OS.

title: Florida AG announces investigation into OpenAI over shooting that allegedly involved ChatGPT
summary: ChatGPT had reportedly been used to plan the attack that killed two and injured five at Florida State University last April. The family of one victim has said that they plan to sue OpenAI over the incident.
title_es: Instant 1.0: nuevo backend especializado para apps codificadas por IA
bajada: InstantDB lanzó versión 1.0 de su arquitectura backend optimizada para aplicaciones generadas y codificadas por IA. La herramienta aborda el vacío entre la generación de código con IA y la infraestructura necesaria para llevar esas aplicaciones a producción.
bajada_en: InstantDB released version 1.0 of its backend architecture optimized for AI-generated and coded applications. The tool addresses the gap between AI code generation and the infrastructure needed to deploy these apps to production.

title: The Vercel plugin on Claude Code wants to read your prompts
summary: Article URL:https://akshaychugh.xyz/writings/png/vercel-plugin-telemetryComments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47704881Points: 267# Comments: 105
title_es: NVIDIA destaca avances en Physical AI durante Robotics Week
bajada: NVIDIA resaltó durante National Robotics Week los progresos en robots, simulación y foundation models que llevan IA al mundo físico. Los avances aceleran el desarrollo de robots en agricultura, manufactura y energía.
bajada_en: NVIDIA highlighted advances in robotics, simulation, and foundation models bringing AI to the physical world during National Robotics Week. Progress is accelerating robot development across agriculture, manufacturing, and energy sectors.

title: National Robotics Week — Latest Physical AI Research, Breakthroughs and Resources
summary: This National Robotics Week, NVIDIA is highlighting the breakthroughs that are bringing AI into the physical world — as well as the growing wave of robots transforming industries, from agricultural and manufacturing to energy and beyond. Advancements in robot learning, simulation and foundation models are accelerating development, enabling robots to move from training in virtual […]
title_es: Black Forest Labs: startup de 70 personas desafía gigantes en IA generativa
bajada: Black Forest Labs, pequeño startup con solo 70 empleados, ha competido exitosamente en generación de imágenes IA contra grandes corporaciones. Ahora apunta a Physical AI como próximo desafío, demostrando que el talento concentrado puede superar ventajas de escala.
bajada_en: Black Forest Labs, a 70-person startup, has successfully competed against tech giants in AI image generation. Now targeting Physical AI, the company demonstrates that concentrated talent can overcome scale advantages.

title: US summons bank bosses over cyber risks from Anthropic's latest AI model
summary: Article URL:https://www.theguardian.com/technology/2026/apr/10/us-summoned-bank-bosses-to-discuss-cyber-risks-posed-by-anthropic-latest-ai-modelComments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47718114Points: 102# Comments: 87
title_es: EE.UU. convoca a bancos para discutir riesgos de modelo de Anthropic
bajada: Reguladores estadounidenses han citado a ejecutivos bancarios para debatir los riesgos cibernéticos del último modelo de IA de Anthropic. La medida refleja la preocupación gubernamental sobre implicaciones de seguridad en sectores críticos.
bajada_en: U.S. regulators have summoned bank executives to discuss cybersecurity risks from Anthropic's latest AI model. The move reflects government concern about security implications in critical sectors.

title: Stalking victim sues OpenAI, claims ChatGPT fueled her abuser’s delusions and ignored her warnings
summary: OpenAI ignored three warnings that a ChatGPT user was dangerous — including its own mass-casualty flag — while he stalked and harassed his ex-girlfriend, a new lawsuit alleges.
title_es: Víctima de acoso demanda a OpenAI por negligencia con ChatGPT
bajada: Una mujer acosada demanda a OpenAI alegando que ChatGPT alimentó las ideas delirantes de su agresor. La demanda alega que OpenAI ignoró tres advertencias sobre comportamiento peligroso, incluyendo alertas internas.
bajada_en: A stalking victim is suing OpenAI alleging ChatGPT fueled her abuser's delusions. The lawsuit claims OpenAI ignored three warnings about dangerous behavior, including internal mass-casualty flags.

title: Anthropic’s Mythos Will Force a Cybersecurity Reckoning—Just Not the One You Think
summary: The new AI model is being heralded—and feared—as a hacker’s superweapon. Experts say its arrival is a wake-up call for developers who have long made security an afterthought.
title_es: Nuevo modelo de Anthropic genera debate sobre seguridad en desarrollo
bajada: El modelo Mythos de Anthropic ha generado preocupación en la industria sobre vulnerabilidades de seguridad que los desarrolladores han ignorado históricamente. Expertos advierten que es una llamada de atención para mejorar las prácticas de seguridad desde el diseño.
bajada_en: Anthropic's Mythos model has raised concerns in the industry about security vulnerabilities that developers have historically overlooked. Experts warn it's a wake-up call for improving security practices from the ground up.

title: AI assistance when contributing to the Linux kernel
summary: Article URL:https://github.com/torvalds/linux/blob/master/Documentation/process/coding-assistants.rstComments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47721953Points: 103# Comments: 83
title_es: Linux abre espacio para asistentes de IA en contribuciones al kernel
bajada: La documentación oficial de Linux ahora incluye orientación sobre el uso de asistentes de IA en contribuciones al kernel. La medida reconoce la realidad de que desarrolladores utilizan herramientas de IA en su flujo de trabajo.
bajada_en: Linux's official documentation now includes guidance on using AI assistants for kernel contributions. The move acknowledges the reality that developers are using AI tools in their workflows.

title: Anthropic temporarily banned OpenClaw’s creator from accessing Claude
summary: This ban took place after Claude's pricing changed for OpenClaw users last week.
title_es: Anthropic bane temporalmente a creador de OpenClaw de Claude
bajada: Anthropic prohibió temporalmente el acceso a Claude al creador de OpenClaw tras cambios de precios. El incidente refleja tensiones sobre control de acceso y términos comerciales de modelos de IA.
bajada_en: Anthropic temporarily banned OpenClaw's creator from accessing Claude following pricing changes. The incident reflects tensions over access control and AI model licensing terms.

title: Using custom GPTs
summary: Learn how to build and use custom GPTs to automate workflows, maintain consistent outputs, and create purpose-built AI assistants.
title_es: OpenAI publica guía sobre GPTs personalizados
bajada: OpenAI ha lanzado material educativo sobre construcción de GPTs personalizados para automatizar flujos de trabajo. La iniciativa busca facilitar que desarrolladores creen asistentes de IA adaptados a casos de uso específicos.
bajada_en: OpenAI has released educational material on building custom GPTs to automate workflows. The initiative aims to help developers create purpose-built AI assistants for specific use cases.

title: This Startup Wants You to Pay Up to Talk With AI Versions of Human Experts
summary: Onix is launching a “Substack of bots,” where digital twins of health and wellness influencers dispense advice 24/7. And maybe hawk their products.
title_es: Startup lanza 'Substack de bots' con gemelos digitales de expertos
bajada: Onix está creando una plataforma de gemelos digitales de influencers en salud que ofrecen asesoría 24/7. El modelo comercial plantea preguntas sobre autenticidad, responsabilidad y venta de productos.
bajada_en: Onix is creating a platform of digital twins of health influencers offering 24/7 advice. The business model raises questions about authenticity, accountability, and product sales.

title: The Iranian Lego AI video creators credit their virality to ‘heart’
summary: Donald Trump has spun the recent rescue of a downed airman whose fighter jet was destroyed behind Iranian borders as a resounding success. But the story is very different in one of the many viral, AI-generated Lego videos that have been produced by Iranian content creation group Explosive Media in the weeks since the US […]
title_es: Videos de Lego generados por IA iraní se viraliza globalmente
bajada: El grupo iraní Explosive Media ha producido videos virales de Lego usando IA generativa. El fenómeno destaca cómo herramientas de IA están siendo utilizadas en narrativas geopolíticas globales.
bajada_en: Iranian group Explosive Media has produced viral AI-generated Lego videos. The phenomenon highlights how AI tools are being used in global geopolitical narratives.

title: 20-year-old man arrested for allegedly throwing a Molotov cocktail at Sam Altman’s house
summary: San Francisco police have arrested a 20-year-old man suspected of throwing a Molotov cocktail at OpenAI CEO Sam Altman's Russian Hill house early Friday morning, The San Francisco Standard reports. The incident was caught on surveillance cameras shortly before 7AM ET. Later that morning, someone matching the suspect's description was seen making threats outside OpenAI's […]
title_es: Arrestan a sospechoso de ataque incendiario contra casa de Sam Altman
bajada: La policía de San Francisco arrestó a un hombre de 20 años acusado de lanzar un cóctel molotov contra la casa de Sam Altman. El incidente refleja tensiones sobre seguridad y activismo contra líderes de IA.
bajada_en: San Francisco police arrested a 20-year-old man suspected of throwing a Molotov cocktail at Sam Altman's house. The incident reflects tensions over safety and activism targeting AI leaders.

title: Working with files in ChatGPT
summary: Learn how to upload and work with files in ChatGPT to analyze data, summarize documents, and generate content from PDFs, spreadsheets, and more.
title_es: ChatGPT mejora herramientas para trabajar con archivos
bajada: OpenAI ha publicado documentación sobre cómo trabajar con archivos en ChatGPT para análisis de datos y generación de contenido. La funcionalidad permite procesar PDFs, hojas de cálculo y otros formatos directamente.
bajada_en: OpenAI has published documentation on working with files in ChatGPT for data analysis and content generation. The feature enables processing PDFs, spreadsheets, and other formats directly.

title: Research with ChatGPT
summary: Learn how to research with ChatGPT using search and deep research to find up-to-date information, analyze sources, and generate structured insights.
title_es: ChatGPT agrega capacidades avanzadas de búsqueda y análisis
bajada: OpenAI ha introducido funcionalidades de búsqueda profunda en ChatGPT para investigación con información actualizada. Los usuarios ahora pueden analizar fuentes y generar insights estructurados directamente.
bajada_en: OpenAI has introduced deep search capabilities in ChatGPT for research with up-to-date information. Users can now analyze sources and generate structured insights directly.

title: Analyzing data with ChatGPT
summary: Learn how to analyze data with ChatGPT by exploring datasets, generating insights, creating visualizations, and turning findings into actionable decisions.
title_es: ChatGPT incorpora herramientas avanzadas de análisis de datos
bajada: OpenAI lanzó guía oficial sobre análisis de datos con ChatGPT incluyendo visualizaciones e insights. La herramienta permite a usuarios explorar datasets y convertir hallazgos en decisiones accionables.
bajada_en: OpenAI released official guidance on data analysis with ChatGPT including visualizations and insights. The tool enables users to explore datasets and turn findings into actionable decisions.

title: Prompting fundamentals
summary: Learn prompting fundamentals and how to write clear, effective prompts to get better, more useful responses from ChatGPT.
title_es: OpenAI publica fundamentales de prompting efectivo
bajada: OpenAI ha lanzado material educativo sobre cómo escribir prompts claros y efectivos para ChatGPT. El recurso busca mejorar la calidad de respuestas a través de técnicas de prompting probadas.
bajada_en: OpenAI has released educational material on writing clear, effective prompts for ChatGPT. The resource aims to improve response quality through proven prompting techniques.

title: TechCrunch is heading to Tokyo — and bringing the Startup Battlefield with it
summary: SusHi Tech 2026 is zeroing in on four technology domains reshaping society: AI, Robotics, Resilience, and Entertainment. Expect live demos of humanoid robots, sessions on autonomous driving's software revolution, deep dives into cyber defense and climate tech, and candid conversations about how AI is rewriting the global music and anime industries.
title_es: TechCrunch anuncia evento tech en Tokio con enfoque en IA y robots
bajada: SusHi Tech 2026 reunirá startups alrededor de IA, robótica, resiliencia y entretenimiento. El evento incluirá demostraciones de robots humanoides y sesiones sobre conducción autónoma y defensa cibernética.
bajada_en: SusHi Tech 2026 will bring together startups around AI, robotics, resilience, and entertainment. The event includes humanoid robot demos and sessions on autonomous driving and cyber defense.

title: What’s in a name? Moderna’s “vaccine” vs. “therapy” dilemma
summary: Is it the Department of Defense or the Department of War? The Gulf of Mexico or the Gulf of America? A vaccine—or an “individualized neoantigen treatment”? That’s the Trump-era vocabulary paradox facing Moderna, the covid-19 shot maker whose plans for next-generation mRNA vaccines against flus and emerging pathogens have been dashed by vaccine skeptics in…
title_es: Moderna enfrenta batalla regulatoria sobre nomenclatura de vacunas mRNA
bajada: Moderna se debate entre llamar 'vacunas' o 'terapias' a sus nuevos tratamientos mRNA en contexto de escepticismo. El dilema de nomenclatura refleja presiones políticas sobre comunicación de productos médicos.
bajada_en: Moderna faces regulatory battles over naming its new mRNA treatments as 'vaccines' or 'therapies' amid skepticism. The naming dilemma reflects political pressures on medical product communication.
